creator: simond@irrelevant.org
text:
The patch looks fine to me, thanks!



On 2 Apr 2009, at 23:00, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of mail/libsrs_alt,

> and a committer will take care of it.
>
